title: Dashboard enhancements
body:
* **Local metric views (Public Preview)**: A new dataset type lets you create metric views directly in a dashboard using a low-code visual interface, without publishing to Unity Catalog first. See [Local metric views](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/data-modeling/local-metric-views).
* **Edit hex color values inline**: Authors can now click directly on a hex color value to edit it in place.
* **View SQL for visualization widgets**: Authors can now view the SQL behind specific visualization widgets while in draft mode. See [View the visualization query](/aws/en/dashboards/manage/visualizations#view-visualization-query).
* **External embedding is now generally available**: Embedding dashboards for external users is now generally available. See [What is embedding for external users?](/aws/en/dashboards/share/embedding/external-embed)
* **Genie Code dataset referencing**: Improved the quality of Genie Code for dashboards when referencing datasets while authoring.
* **Waterfall chart totals**: Waterfall charts with categorical X-axis now support a total bar.
* **Scatter plot shape field**: Scatter plots now support a shape field to differentiate data points by category.
* **Vertical annotations with dual axis**: Fixed a bug where vertical annotations did not appear in charts with dual axis enabled.
* **Text widget character limit**: Fixed a bug where the text widget accepted more characters than supported but silently failed to save.

ref_links.text: What is embedding for external users?
